      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "import pandas as pd\n",
        "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
        "import seaborn as sns\n",
        "from scipy.stats import pearsonr, spearmanr, ttest_1samp"
      ],

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# Load the dataset\n",
        "df = pd.read_csv('train.csv')"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "UURseL1_BGy2"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": []
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "def get_descriptive_stats(data_sample, field_name):\n",
        "    \"\"\"\n",
        "    Function to perform descriptive statistics on a specific field of a sample.\n",
        "    \"\"\"\n",
        "    stats = {\n",
        "        'Count': data_sample[field_name].count(),\n",
        "        'Mean': data_sample[field_name].mean(),\n",
        "        'Median': data_sample[field_name].median(),\n",
        "        'Mode': data_sample[field_name].mode()[0],\n",
        "        'Standard Deviation': data_sample[field_name].std(),\n",
        "        'Variance': data_sample[field_name].var(),\n",
        "        'Minimum': data_sample[field_name].min(),\n",
        "        'Maximum': data_sample[field_name].max()\n",
        "    }\n",
        "    return pd.Series(stats)"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "Zx0v6f3FBmOh"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": []
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "print(get_descriptive_stats(df, \"Interest Rate\"))"
      ],

    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "from scipy.stats import chi2_contingency\n",
        "print(f\"\\n--- HYPOTHESIS TESTS ---\")\n",
        "# 3. Hypothesis Tests\n",
        "# Hypothesis Test: Correlation between Loan Amount and Interest Rate\n",
        "p_corr, p_p = pearsonr(df['Loan Amount'], df['Interest Rate'])\n",
        "s_corr, s_p = spearmanr(df['Loan Amount'], df['Interest Rate'])\n",
        "\n",
        "# Chi-Square (Categorical: Grade vs Loan Status)\n",
        "chi_p = chi2_contingency(pd.crosstab(df['Grade'], df['Loan Status']))[1]\n",
        "\n",
        "# One Sample T-test\n",
        "# Checking if our random sample mean represents the population mean\n",
        "pop_mean = df['Interest Rate'].mean()\n",
        "t_stat, p_t = ttest_1samp(random_sample['Interest Rate'], pop_mean)\n",
        "\n",
        "print(f\"One Sample T-test (Sample vs Population Mean): t-stat={t_stat:.4f}, p-value={p_t:.4f}\")\n",
        "\n",
        "print(f\"\\nPearson p: {p_p:.4f} | Chi-Square p: {chi_p:.4f} | T-test p: {p_t:.4f} |spearman s: {s_p:.4f} \")\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "DfyyvEpoFOPC",
        "outputId": "bbec6ba8-9e8c-45ed-f911-68dc5ae8d3c1"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "\n",
            "--- HYPOTHESIS TESTS ---\n",
            "One Sample T-test (Sample vs Population Mean): t-stat=1.5983, p-value=0.1121\n",
            "\n",
            "Pearson p: 0.3387 | Chi-Square p: 0.3711 | T-test p: 0.1121 |spearman s: 0.1616 \n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "from scipy.stats import pearsonr, spearmanr\n",
        "\n",
        "x = df[\"Loan Amount\"].dropna()\n",
        "y = df[\"Interest Rate\"].dropna()\n",
        "\n",
        "# Align lengths safely\n",
        "temp = df[[\"Loan Amount\", \"Interest Rate\"]].dropna()\n",
        "pearson_r, pearson_p = pearsonr(temp[\"Loan Amount\"], temp[\"Interest Rate\"])\n",
        "spearman_r, spearman_p = spearmanr(temp[\"Loan Amount\"], temp[\"Interest Rate\"])\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"Pearson Correlation: r =\", round(pearson_r, 4), \", p-value =\", round(pearson_p, 4))\n",
        "print(\"Spearman Correlation: r =\", round(spearman_r, 4), \", p-value =\", round(spearman_p, 4))\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "F5RXK1bopb8f",
        "outputId": "7aea1522-f7b8-4775-ac1c-5bb5153a68f2"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Pearson Correlation: r = -0.0052 , p-value = 0.3387\n",
            "Spearman Correlation: r = -0.0076 , p-value = 0.1616\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "from scipy.stats import chi2_contingency\n",
        "import pandas as pd\n",
        "\n",
        "contingency_table = pd.crosstab(df[\"Grade\"], df[\"Loan Status\"])\n",
        "chi2, p, dof, expected = chi2_contingency(contingency_table)\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"Chi-Square p-value =\", round(p, 4))"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "KN1m4jnUqlE5",
        "outputId": "17b77ce3-325b-4ef4-f510-f6faa798d112"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Chi-Square p-value = 0.3711\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "from scipy.stats import ttest_1samp\n",
        "\n",
        "pop_mean = df[\"Interest Rate\"].mean()\n",
        "\n",
        "random_sample = df.sample(n=150, random_state=42)\n",
        "t_stat, p_val = ttest_1samp(random_sample[\"Interest Rate\"].dropna(), pop_mean)\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"Population Mean (Interest Rate):\", round(pop_mean, 4))\n",
        "print(\"Sample Mean (Interest Rate):\", round(random_sample[\"Interest Rate\"].mean(), 4))\n",
        "print(\"t-statistic:\", round(t_stat, 4))\n",
        "print(\"p-value:\", round(p_val, 4))\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "JMfJyRQFqpq9",
        "outputId": "2533e1a1-43b3-4ad0-b3fd-f027c4b45dc8"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Population Mean (Interest Rate): 11.8576\n",
            "Sample Mean (Interest Rate): 12.328\n",
            "t-statistic: 1.5983\n",
            "p-value: 0.1121\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "from scipy.stats import shapiro\n",
        "\n",
        "# Test 3: One Sample T-Test\n",
        "# Purpose: To find if the average Interest Rate of our sample is the same as the population.\n",
        "# Includes the Shapiro-Wilk test for normality as requested in your document.\n",
        "# ---------------------------------------------------------\n",
        "print(\"--- 3. ONE SAMPLE T-TEST ---\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# Step A: Find the average of the whole population\n",
        "population_mean = df['Interest Rate'].mean()\n",
        "print(f\"Population Mean (Interest Rate): {population_mean:.4f}\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# Step B: Extract a sample (e.g., taking a random sample of 150)\n",
        "sample_data = df.sample(n=150, random_state=42)['Interest Rate']\n",
        "sample_mean = sample_data.mean()\n",
        "print(f\"Sample Mean (Interest Rate): {sample_mean:.4f}\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# Step C: Check whether the sample is normally distributed using Shapiro-Wilk method\n",
        "stat_shapiro, p_value_shapiro = shapiro(sample_data)\n",
        "print(f\"Shapiro-Wilk Normality P-value: {p_value_shapiro:.4f}\")\n",
        "if p_value_shapiro > 0.05:\n",
        "    print(\" -> The sample data looks normally distributed (Fail to reject H0).\")\n",
        "else:\n",
        "    print(\" -> The sample data does not look normally distributed (Reject H0).\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# Step D: Perform one sample T-test\n",
        "t_statistic, p_value_ttest = ttest_1samp(sample_data, population_mean)\n",
        "print(f\"\\nT-Statistic: {t_statistic:.4f}\")\n",
        "print(f\"One Sample T-test P-value: {p_value_ttest:.4f}\")"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "738xHLehMYxO",
        "outputId": "14a4d1ee-b335-4975-e3da-c2ac873b0e44"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "--- 3. ONE SAMPLE T-TEST ---\n",
            "Population Mean (Interest Rate): 11.8576\n",
            "Sample Mean (Interest Rate): 12.3280\n",
            "Shapiro-Wilk Normality P-value: 0.0176\n",
            " -> The sample data does not look normally distributed (Reject H0).\n",
            "\n",
            "T-Statistic: 1.5983\n",
            "One Sample T-test P-value: 0.1121\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "# Test 2: Chi-Square Test\n",
        "# Purpose: To check whether Loan Grade is independent or dependent on Loan Status\n",
        "# ---------------------------------------------------------\n",
        "print(\"--- 2. CHI-SQUARE TEST ---\")\n",
        "# Creating a contingency table for the two categorical variables\n",
        "contingency_table = pd.crosstab(df['Grade'], df['Loan Status'])\n",
        "\n",
        "# Performing the Chi-Square test\n",
        "chi2_stat, p_value_chi2, dof, expected = chi2_contingency(contingency_table)\n",
        "\n",
        "print(f\"Chi-Square Statistic: {chi2_stat:.4f}\")\n",
        "print(f\"P-Value: {p_value_chi2:.4f}\")\n",
        "print(f\"Degrees of Freedom: {dof}\\n\")\n"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "smqs0GFtNl-x",
        "outputId": "e07b60c2-bdc8-47b1-8bb7-2d4a486e389c"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "--- 2. CHI-SQUARE TEST ---\n",
            "Chi-Square Statistic: 6.4847\n",
            "P-Value: 0.3711\n",
            "Degrees of Freedom: 6\n",
            "\n"
          ]
        }
      ]

        "plt.show()\n"
